item.name: POST create order by text address
POST create order by address id
POST create order by text address + coupon
POST create order by address id + coupon
GET all transactions for admin (filtered sample)
PUT update transaction status to success (ADMIN)
PUT update transaction status to failed (ADMIN)
PATCH mark all notifications as read
PATCH mark one notification as read

variable.description: Thay bang _id cua role sau khi tao
Thay bang _id cua role USER de tao tai khoan user bang /users
Thay bang _id cua role ADMIN de tao tai khoan admin bang /users
Thay bang _id cua user sau khi tao
Thay bang token USER nhan duoc sau khi login
Thay bang token ADMIN nhan duoc sau khi login
Thay bang _id cua product sau khi tao
Thay bang _id cua category sau khi tao
Thay bang _id cua USER can xem lich su chat
Thay bang _id cua dia chi sau khi tao
Thay bang _id cua coupon sau khi tao
Thay bang _id cua order sau khi tao
Thay bang _id cua transaction can test
Thay bang _id cua review can xoa
Thay bang _id cua notification can danh dau da doc
Ten file anh sau khi upload de test GET /upload/:filename
Ten file anh dau tien sau khi upload de gan vao product.images
Ten file anh thu hai sau khi upload de gan vao product.images
Ten file anh thu ba sau khi upload de cap nhat product.images
Username ADMIN mau de login nhanh
Mat khau ADMIN mau
Username USER mau de login nhanh
Mat khau USER mau
Ma coupon mau de validate va dat hang
So dien thoai mau khi tao address
